free_text: NEUTRON-INDUCED FISSION CROSS SECTIONS FOR U233, U235,

CONVERTED TO REACTION FORMALISM BIB CORRECTION

INCIDENT ENERGY GREATER THAN 9.5 MEV AND LESS
( ALSO FOR D-T REACTIONS WITH INCIDENT ENERGIES
- UNCERTAINTIES IN FISSION FUEL MASSES AND PROTON
